Goal model: Need to find the connection from the horizontal corridor to the white areas below.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Go LEFT to starting position and check surroundings
result = action(['LEFT'])
print(f"After LEFT: done={last_action_result.get('done')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for node in nodes:
    if node['color'] == 'b' and node['pixels'] == 24:
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
        print(f"Player: r{min(rows)}-{max(rows)} c{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Check surroundings more broadly
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
pr = [n for n in nodes if n['color']=='b' and n['pixels']==24][0]
pr_min, pr_max = min([p[0] for p in pr['boundary']]), max([p[0] for p in pr['boundary']])
pc_min, pc_max = min([p[1] for p in pr['boundary']]), max([p[1] for p in pr['boundary']])
print(f"\nAround player (wider view):")
for r in range(max(0,pr_min-3), min(64,pr_max+10)):
    print(f"r{r:2d}: {ascii_lines[r][pc_min-5:pc_max+20]}")

# Also check if DOWN works from here
print("\nTrying DOWN...")
result2 = action(['DOWN'])
seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
nodes2 = seg2['nodes']
for node in nodes2:
    if node['color'] == 'b' and node['pixels'] == 24:
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
        print(f"Player after DOWN: r{min(rows)}-{max(rows)} c{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

    if node['color'] == 'b' and node['pixels'] == 24:
        rows = [p[0] for p in node['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in node['boundary']]
        print(f"Player after DOWN: r{min(rows)}-{max(rows)} c{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
